markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review November performance and align on holiday schedule and Q1 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**November SEO performance was strong:** Sessions grew 5% MoM, branded metrics rose, and the Model Hub attracted clicks despite low-volume searches.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [**New content tactics will target specific goals:** Adding FAQs/TLDRs to articles will aim to close the Scrunch referral gap with Brain Trust, while publishing commercial-intent listicles will capitalize on their strong LLM search performance.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [**Competitor content strategy is shifting:** To capture traffic now, competitor reviews will be published as standard blogs and later redirected to a new, repeatable "vs." page template once it's finalized.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [**Holiday schedule is set:** GrowthX's publishing pause (week of Dec 29) aligns with Galileo's vacation (Dec 30–Jan 10), enabling an async sync for the first week of January.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

## Topics

### November Performance Review

  - [**Sessions:** +5% MoM, recovering from a Thanksgiving dip.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [**Impressions:** Non-branded impressions decreased slightly, but branded impressions and clicks rose.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [**Top Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - ["Testing AI Agents" pillar page](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [Several metrics-oriented blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [An Amazon validation blog (pure SEO play)](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [**Top Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [Observability saw the largest percentage jump due to increased content production.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [Model Hub attracted \~55 sessions, a positive sign given the models are not high-volume searches.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [**Keyword Rankings:**](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**Top 10 Keywords:** Stable at \~313 (vs. 322 last month).](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**Competitor Top 10:** Arise dropped from 900+ to 820; Galileo's rank is stable.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**LLM Visibility:** Slightly down from last month but near an all-time high.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**Scrunch Referral Traffic:** The gap with Brain Trust remains unchanged.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)

### Strategic Adjustments & Content Plan

  - [**New Content Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
      - [**FAQs & TLDRs:** Adding these sections to new content to test for a Scrunch referral traffic bump. If successful, this will be rolled out across all articles.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
      - [**Commercial-Intent Listicles:** Prioritizing "top X tools" articles to capitalize on their strong performance in LLM search results.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [**Competitor Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [**Problem:** The initial "vs. competitor" page mockup is not repeatable, requiring a bespoke design for each new competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [**Decision:** Publish competitor reviews as standard blogs now to capture traffic. These will be redirected to the new, repeatable template once it's finalized.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [**Action:** Galileo will review and publish Vellum, Patronus, and Weights and Biases blogs within the next week.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [**Pillar Page Refinements:**](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
      - [**Category Consolidation:** Consolidate all "evals" content (agent, LLM, Gen AI) under a single "AI evals" category for Jason's reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
      - [**New Pillar Page:** Create a standalone "AI agent evaluation" pillar page, as it warrants its own presence rather than being a sub-topic.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [**AI-Generated Images:**](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [**Tool:** Nano Banana is being used to generate inline article images, inspired by the Napkin app's workflow (highlight text → generate infographic).](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [**Approval:** The sample image meets brand standards. This process will save time and produce assets that can also be used on social media.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

### Holiday Schedule

  - [**GrowthX:** Publishing pause during the final week of the year (week of Dec 29).](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Galileo:** Vacation from Dec 30–Jan 10.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**Overlap:** The publishing pause aligns with Galileo's vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Sync Plan:** The first sync of January will be async.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [**Support:** A GrowthX team member (likely Vivek) will monitor Slack daily during the holiday period.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Galileo:**](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [Review 13 articles awaiting feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [Publish competitor blogs (Vellum, Patronus, Weights and Biases) within the next week.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [Create the "AI agent evaluation" pillar page and set up the redirect today.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
      - [Consolidate "evals" content into the "AI evals" category.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
      - [Begin adding FAQs/TLDRs to new content to test for a Scrunch traffic bump.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
      - [Prioritize commercial-intent listicles in the content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [Monitor Slack daily during the holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/yeNzXM8d2Ly7-MowqYrCzBtPXGuxcY_2?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
